TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team

Team.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the team this player is employed by

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

Name.description: The full name of the goaltender

DepthType.description: Indicates whether it is a goalie tandem or not for a goalie depth chart (returns Tandem; Regular)

DisplayType.description: If the goalie depth chart is displayed as a Tandem or as Regular

DepthOrder.description: The order of the goalie in the team's depth chart

Created.description: The timestamp of when this depth chart was last edited; based on US Eastern Time (EST/EDT)

Updated.description: The timestamp of when the record was last updated (in US Eastern Time)
